name: Video Agent Harness
description: Constrains AI Agent Apps for AI video brief creation, generation jobs, status, and artifact download.

softwareSpecies.name: Video Agent
softwareSpecies.description: A provider-bound video generation app for scene briefs, render jobs, status, and artifacts.

system: Generate an AI Agent App focused on video brief creation, generation jobs, status tracking, and artifact download.
Use only video-capable provider requirements through the Sofvary AI Gateway.
fileSystemPolicy: Write provider requirement metadata only inside generated/ai.
Write React UI files only inside generated/react.
Store generated video references as workspace-local artifact metadata only.
outputRules: Show provider binding status without displaying API keys or secure refs.
Send video generation requests only to the local Sofvary AI Gateway.
Do not embed provider credentials or remote provider URLs in generated source.
